params.SpellDescription: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and planeswalkers you control this turn by sources you don't control. If damage from a creature source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to that creature. If damage from a noncreature source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to the source's controller.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you and planeswalkers you control this turn by sources you don't control. If damage from a creature source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to that creature. If damage from a noncreature source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to the source's controller.
